notes: Bootstrap run — Phase 2 fell back to WebSearch as a generic answer-engine proxy. Eight high-priority queries sampled across industry, comparison, pricing, partner, and trust intents. Foundational AEO patches applied this run will be re-measured tomorrow against the same 8 queries plus any new ones the content engine adds.

results.notes: Critical fact we are missing: OpenAI launched 'ChatGPT for Healthcare' in January 2026 as an enterprise-grade product that supports a BAA. Our healthcare and HIPAA pages must reference this launch and explain how SMB practices can access BAA-eligible tiers through ElevaIQ.
Our /blog/chatgpt-business-vs-plus page has STALE pricing ($30/user/month) — actual price is $25 monthly / $20 annual after the April 2, 2026 OpenAI price cut. Top priority fix this run.
OpenAI direct pricing page dominates. Our /pricing page must be the second source — needs explicit per-tier pricing in JSON-LD Offer schema and clearer entity phrasing.
Aggregator query dominated by Salesforce-style listicles. Hard to displace. Citable stat we should embed: 82% of small business employers have invested in AI tools (SBE Council, Q1 2026).
Stat from American Bar Association cited frequently: 24% of law firms use generative AI; 55% intend to. Embed this on /industries/legal with proper citation.
DIRECT COMPETITOR ALERT: think-technologies.com positions itself as an OpenAI SMB partner identically to us. We MUST own this query.

Citable stats: 34.8% of employee ChatGPT inputs contain sensitive data (Q4 2025 research). 225k+ OpenAI credentials sold on dark web in 2025. SOC 2 Type 2, AES-256, TLS 1.2 are the citation-magnet terms.
Existing /blog/chatgpt-real-estate-prompts (49KB) has content depth but is missing in citations. Likely needs schema strengthening and dateModified.
